---
name: Feature request
about: A new surface, a new integration, a workflow you wish CCC supported
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
---

## What would you like to see?

<!-- One sentence. -->

## Why — what's the underlying need?

<!-- Describe the workflow this solves. "I want to do X, but today I have to
     do Y and Z because CCC doesn't know about Q." -->

## How might it work?

<!-- Rough sketch, API, UI placement. Not required — the maintainer will
     help shape it. -->

## Scope check

- [ ] macOS-only is fine (this project doesn't target Linux/Windows)
- [ ] Single-user / localhost-only (no multi-tenant, no auth work)
- [ ] Stdlib-only Python (no new runtime dependencies)

<!-- If any of these are deal-breakers for you, say so — the constraints
     above are intentional but can be revisited with good reason. -->
